name: @orrgal1/forge
description: Self-contained PR forge chain — no dependency on other plugins; map host-repo tooling via /forge-setup into a gitignored .forge/ dir. setup (/forge-setup) + start (/forge-start) + atoms (/forge-goals, /forge-scenarios, /forge-tests, /forge-design, /forge-audit, /forge-review) + per-layer attestation skills (/forge-verify-goals, /forge-verify-scenarios, /forge-verify-tests, /forge-verify-match, /forge-verify-runs) + fix-loops (/forge-impl-green, /forge-audit-green, /forge-ci-green, /forge-review-green) + orchestrator (/forge). /forge drives start → goals (AWAIT_GOALS_REVIEW) → design (AWAIT_DESIGN_REVIEW) → scenarios → tests → impl → audit-green → ci-green → review-green → final-ci → READY. Modes: auto | manual. Resume via /forge approve and /forge iterate "<feedback>". Bundles its own lens pool + reviewer persona (extensible via .forge/). Artifacts under .pr-artifacts/<branch-slug>/forge/.
author: orrgal1
